root: ^Food Bank Rep: I am the representative for the Stonewake City Food Bank here at the Homeless Shelter.

Next: ^Player: Hi, the Health Center representative told me to speak with you after turning in their requirement.
^Food Bank Rep: Perfect! That means you’ve completed your visit with them.
^Food Bank Rep: We work closely with the shelter to ensure everyone has access to groceries and essential food supplies here in the shelter.
Next2: ^Food Bank Rep: Your next step is to visit the Stonewake City Food Bank building.
Location: ^Player: Where is the Food Bank located?
^Food Bank Rep: It is located directly East of the Homeless Shelter. It's past the fire department and the supermarket.  It's has truck outside of it, to help you find it.
Next3: ^Food Bank Rep: When you arrive, speak to the staff inside to learn about our services and how we distribute food to the community in need.
^Food Bank Rep: Please bring me back a canned food item from the Food Bank as proof of your visit.
^Food Bank Rep: It doesn’t matter what kind of can it is, just make sure it’s sealed and clearly labeled.
GotIt: ^Player: Alright, I’ll bring back a food can from the Food Bank.
^Food Bank Rep: Great! When you return and give me the can, and that will complete another requirement.
^Food Bank Rep: After that, please go speak to the Homeless Shelter worker to my left to continue your housing process.
Where: ^NPC: To the person on my left.
Bye: ^Player: Sounds good! I’ll be back soon with the canned food item.
